reason: Ellie’s cosmic odyssey in meditative void of stars and silence
Quiet Western epic lingering on landscape and inner yearning
Minimalist trek through barren moors drenched in contemplative gloom
Subtle family horror unfolding in slow, uncanny countryside pulse
Chronicling nocturnal lives in Hong Kong with poetic, patient lens
Looping days in rain-soaked small town capturing quiet transformation
Disillusioned reporter’s reflective voyage through political decay
Subterranean espionage as haunting, measured descent into darkness
Dark comedy’s measured pace probes modern alienation and absurdity
Boy and dog’s serene odyssey against tide-washed solitude
